creator: raimeetravel
caption:
The perfect wellness escape from Tokyo… here’s everywhere we visited!

I had no idea you could do all of this so close to Tokyo, and I don’t think most people realize this either. If you’re planning a trip to Japan and want a balance of city and nature, you need to add these to your itinerary since it’s only 90min from Tokyo!

 📍 Hokuto, Yamanashi
 📍 Moegi Village
 📍 Kayaking at Moegi Village
 📍 ROCK Curry House
 📍 Kiyosato Terrace (Panoramic Lift)
 📍 Doryu Falls
 📍 Grand Mercure Yatsugatake Resort & Spa

Comment “PATH” and I’ll send you my full blog post with tips, travel times, and everything we did.

@tokyotokyooldmeetsnew
#Japan #Tokyo #tokyotokyo
#2025connectedjapan #pr

transcription.text: places in japan no one talks about and i still don't know why this is part three of getting off the beaten path in japan and we are exploring yamanashi there's so much to do here and it's less than two hours away from tokyo you can go kayaking on this peaceful forest pond then go stop by this village and try the famous rock beef curry it's been their signature for over 50 years and it totally lives up to the hype then for some beautiful views of the alps go take the lift up to kiyosoto terrace it's almost 2 000 meters the views are insane you can see mount fuji the southern alps and this bright blue sky that they're known for you can end the day with a walk around toriu falls it's quiet beautiful it honestly looks like something straight out of an old japanese painting so next time you're in tokyo and you need a little break from the city go check out all these things in yamanashi it's the perfect quick nature and wellness retreat and it's still a hidden gem
